🏢 For Indian MSMEs & Startups

Raise ₹10L–₹5Cr from 2,000+ verified investors in 30 days

SEBI-aligned private placement. CA/CS verified. PAS-3 automated. No investment bankers, no ridiculous fees, no months of waiting.

Apply as MSME →

From application to funded in 30 days

Our structured process removes compliance bottlenecks.

📝Day 1

Apply online

Submit company details, financials, and documents via our secure portal.

🧑‍⚖️Day 3

CA/CS assigned

An empanelled professional reviews your PAS-4, audited accounts, and compliance checklist.

🤖Day 7

AI scoring

FairFund AI scores your financial health, execution track record, and market position.

✅Day 10

Listing approved

Admin review complete. Your deal goes live to 2,000+ verified investors.

💰Day 21

Funds in escrow

Investments flow in. Funds held securely until allotment is confirmed by the board.

📤Day 30

Allotment & PAS-3

Shares allotted, PAS-3 auto-filed with MCA. Cap table updated automatically.

Are you eligible?

✅ Incorporated in India (Pvt Ltd, LLP, or similar)
✅ Minimum 2 years of operations
✅ Audited financials for at least 1 FY
✅ Raising ₹10 Lakh – ₹5 Crore
✅ Director KYC (PAN + Aadhaar)
❌ Not a financial services company or NBFC
❌ No active insolvency or legal proceedings

Transparent pricing

Listing fee

Free for first 6 months (early access)

₹0

Platform fee

Of total amount raised, deducted at allotment

2%

CA/CS review

Included — assigned by FairFund

₹0

PAS-3 auto-filing

Automated, no CA fees for ROC

₹0

eSign per investor

Per subscription agreement signed

FairFund

Private placement under Companies Act 2013 §42. Max 200 investors per offering.
